title: Tub Playset - Space from Deluxebase. 12 Piece Educational Sea Life Toy Playset for Kids. Reusable Tub with Astronauts, Planets, Rocket, Space Shuttle, Satellite, Moon Rock plus Accessories
features: SPACE TOY SET: Spark curiosity with 8 piece set with astronauts, planets, rocket, space shuttle, satellite, space moon rock and other accessories for endless adventure and imaginative play. The perfect space toy for nature play, creepy crawlies fans, and adventures.
REUSABLE TOY STORAGE TUB: Stored in a reusable storage tub to keep all your space figurines organised. Perfect for quick clean-up and portable fun at home, school, or on holiday.
LEARN THROUGH PLAY: Encourage creativity and sensory development while teaching kids about space and planets. A hands-on alternative to screen time that makes learning exciting.

EXPANSIVE COLLECTION & GIFT: Add to your play animals collection with the rest of the Tub Playset range featuring Dinosaurs, Ocean Animals, Farm Animals and even Space Toys. Ideal as birthday gifts, party favours, or Christmas stocking fillers.

BUY WITH CONFIDENCE: With over 25 years of experience, Deluxebase specialises in designing fun and educational toys, and gifts for kids and adults, in the UK, the US, and Europe. We carefully crafted all of our products by maintaining the highest quality and safety, so that you can purchase our products with confidence.
description: FANTASTIC TOYS FOR CHILDREN - high quality and detailed animals! Our range of Playsets can keep the whole family entertained, for hours on end!
